## Summary of ContosoUniversity Project Source Files

### **Models**

**Person.cs** (Abstract base class)
- Properties: ID, LastName, FirstMidName (FirstName column), FullName (computed)
- Base class for Student and Instructor inheritance

**Student.cs**
- Extends Person
- Properties: EnrollmentDate (datetime2, with date range validation 1753-9999)
- Navigation: Enrollments collection

**Instructor.cs**
- Extends Person
- Properties: HireDate (datetime2, with date range validation)
- Navigation: CourseAssignments, OfficeAssignment

**Course.cs**
- Properties: CourseID (non-auto-generated), Title (3-50 chars), Credits (0-5), DepartmentID, TeachingMaterialImagePath
- Navigation: Department, Enrollments, CourseAssignments

**CourseAssignment.cs**
- Composite key: InstructorID, CourseID
- Relationships: Links Instructor to Course (many-to-many)

**Department.cs**
- Properties: DepartmentID, Name (3-50 chars), Budget (money), StartDate, InstructorID (nullable)
- Concurrency: RowVersion timestamp
- Navigation: Administrator (Instructor), Courses collection

**Enrollment.cs**
- Enum: Grade (A, B, C, D, F)
- Properties: EnrollmentID, CourseID, StudentID, Grade (nullable)
- Navigation: Course, Student

**ErrorViewModel.cs**
- Properties: RequestId, ShowRequestId computed property

**Notification.cs**
- Properties: Id, EntityType (100 chars), EntityId (50 chars), Operation (20 chars - CREATE/UPDATE/DELETE), Message (256 chars)
- Properties: CreatedAt (datetime2), CreatedBy (100 chars), IsRead, ReadAt (datetime2)
- Enum: EntityOperation (CREATE, UPDATE, DELETE)

**OfficeAssignment.cs**
- Properties: InstructorID (primary key), Location (50 chars)
- Navigation: Instructor (one-to-one relationship)

### **ViewModels (SchoolViewModels)**

**AssignedCourseData.cs**
- Properties: CourseID, Title, Assigned (bool)

**EnrollmentDateGroup.cs**
- Properties: EnrollmentDate, StudentCount
- Used for grouping students by enrollment date

**InstructorIndexData.cs**
- Collections: Instructors, Courses, Enrollments
- Composite view model for instructor details page

### **Controllers**

**BaseController.cs**
- Abstract base for all controllers
- Protected properties: db (SchoolContext), notificationService (NotificationService)
- Protected methods: SendEntityNotification (overloaded)
- Handles notification dispatching and resource disposal

**CoursesController.cs** (Extends BaseController)
- Actions: Index, Details, Create (GET/POST with file upload), Edit (GET/POST with file upload), Delete (GET/POST)
- File handling: Image upload validation (5MB, jpg/jpeg/png/gif/bmp), file deletion on update/delete
- Notifications sent on CREATE, UPDATE, DELETE operations

**DepartmentsController.cs** (Extends BaseController)
- Actions: Index, Details, Create (GET/POST), Edit (GET/POST with concurrency handling), Delete (GET/POST)
- Concurrency handling: DbUpdateConcurrencyException with detailed conflict display
- Notifications sent on CREATE, UPDATE, DELETE

**HomeController.cs** (Extends BaseController)
- Actions: Index, About (with EnrollmentDateGroup grouping), Contact, Error, Unauthorized
- No CRUD operations; display-only

**InstructorsController.cs** (Extends BaseController)
- Actions: Index (with optional filtering), Details, Create (GET/POST), Edit (GET/POST async), Delete (GET/POST)
- Complex: PopulateAssignedCourseData, UpdateInstructorCourses for course assignment management
- Async Edit with TryUpdateModelAsync
- Department administrator cleanup on deletion
- Notifications sent on CREATE, UPDATE, DELETE

**NotificationsController.cs** (Extends BaseController)
- Actions: GetNotifications (GET), MarkAsRead (POST), Index (GET)
- Returns JSON with notification queue (max 10 at a time)
- In-memory queue operations

**StudentsController.cs** (Extends BaseController)
- Actions: Index (with paging, sorting, searching), Details, Create (GET/POST), Edit (GET/POST), Delete (GET/POST)
- Paging: 10 students per page
- Sorting: By name, enrollment date (ascending/descending)
- Search: By LastName or FirstMidName
- Date validation: Must be between 1753-9999
- Notifications sent on CREATE, UPDATE, DELETE
- Error handling with Trace output

### **Data**

**SchoolContext.cs** (DbContext)
- DbSets: Courses, Enrollments, Departments, OfficeAssignments, CourseAssignments, People, Students, Instructors, Notifications
- Configuration: Table-per-Hierarchy (TPH) inheritance for Person/Student/Instructor with "Discriminator" column
- All DateTime properties mapped to "datetime2" SQL type
- Relationships configured: CourseAssignment composite key, one-to-one OfficeAssignment-Instructor

**DbInitializer.cs**
- Seeds database with sample data:
  - 8 Students with enrollment dates 2005-2013
  - 5 Instructors with hire dates 1995-2004
  - 4 Departments (English, Mathematics, Engineering, Economics)
  - 7 Courses across departments
  - 3 Office assignments
  - 8 Course assignments (instructor-course links)
  - 11 Enrollments with grades

**SchoolContextFactory.cs**
- Factory method to create SchoolContext with connection string
- Configures SQL Server retry policy (5 retries, 30-second max delay)

### **Services**

**NotificationService.cs**
- In-memory ConcurrentQueue<Notification> implementation (not database-backed)
- Methods: SendNotification (overloaded), ReceiveNotification, MarkAsRead (no-op)
- Max queue length: 500 notifications
- GenerateMessage method creates formatted notification messages based on operation type
- Implements IDisposable

This is a complete ASP.NET Core MVC university management system with:
- Entity models with validation and relationships
- CRUD controllers with file upload, concurrency handling, and paging
- Database context with TPH inheritance
- Notification system for entity lifecycle events
- View models for complex data display
